You can request a travel suspension.

Please take note:
- Extension fee: S$50 per month of suspension
- Duration: Processed in 1-month blocks, up to a maximum of 3 months
- Expiry adjustment: Your membership expiry date will be extended by the duration of the suspension once the fee is processed

Our Customer Care team will be in touch within the next 48 hours.
